name: Washing machine
description:
Two gentlemen living in a one-room rental flat are in need of a washing machine. One of them is unable to work due to ongoing health issues, while the other relies on irregular odd-job work whenever opportunities arise. With their limited income, they are struggling to cope with daily expenses, and purchasing a washing machine is simply not affordable for them at this time.

A donated washing machine would go a long way in easing their day-to-day challenges. It would not only help them maintain cleanliness and dignity, but also provide some comfort and relief in managing their daily lives during this difficult period.

name: Washing Machine
description: Given the family’s current financial constraints, they are unable to purchase the washing machine on their own. Support with sourcing a washing machine would therefore be beneficial to improve their overall living conditions.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Ang Mo Kio 230
contact.name: Nurul Adryana Abu Bakar

name: Washing Machine
description: Family has expressed a need for a washing machine as their current household requires a new one. It is challenging for them to purchase it independently, given the family’s current circumstances.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Ang Mo Kio 230
contact.name: Nurul Adryana Abu Bakar

name: Washing Machine
description: A family of 7 including a toddler are in urgent need of washing machine to aid their daily living and for baby needs. They are a low income family living in a rented flat with 3 school going young ones. Mother incarcerated and family survives with minimal support and struggles to replace broken appliances.A washing machine will go along way in improving their quality of life and offering proper hygiene to the family.

name: Washing Machine
description: Client is a single mum with 3 young children. Their washing machine broke down recently and she's been either hand washing or bringing it down to the laundromat. A washing machine would greatly benefit the family.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Woodlands, Sembawang
contact.name: Aryani Ramlan

name: Washing Machine
description: Couple unfit for work due to medical condition and caregiving responsibilities require a replacement washing machine as the old one is beyond repair. Kindly what's app family coach Christopher at 62319504 if you are interested to help this couple. Thank you.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Kreta Ayer
contact.name: Christopher Pang

name: Washing machine
description: I’m currently supporting two formerly homeless clients who have just moved into an empty HDB rental flat in Bedok last week. A washing machine would make a meaningful difference in helping them manage their laundry independently and settle into their new home with greater comfort and dignity. Any support would be deeply appreciated. 💛🙏

contact.org: The SBL Vision Family Service Centre
contact.name: Zoe Lim

name: Washing machine
description: This family of four has recently moved into their rental flat after spending two years in transitional shelter, marking a significant and hopeful milestone toward stability and independence. As they rebuild their lives, they are starting from scratch and lack essential household items needed to make their new space functional and dignified. The mother, who is the sole breadwinner, earns just over $2,000 a month and works hard to provide for her family, but her income is largely committed to daily living expenses, utilities, school needs, and basic necessities. A washing machine would greatly ease the family’s financial and physical burden by reducing the need to go to a laundromat. Your support in donating a washing machine would not only meet a practical need but also help provide the family with greater stability, comfort, and dignity as they settle into their new home.

name: Washing Machine
description: A family of 7 including a toddler are in need of washing machine to aid their daily living especially with several school going kids and baby needs. They are a low income family living in a rented flat. Mother incarcerated and family survives with minimal support and struggles to replace broken appliances. A washing machine will aid the family's need and functioning.

name: Washing machine
description: Family comprises a single mother and her daughter. Their washing machine has spoiled and they require a new one, preferably with front load, to wash their clothes.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Jalan Besar and Toa Payoh
contact.name: Emilyn Teo

name: Washing Machine
description: I've a low-income 68 year old lady staying in a rental flat at Bendeemer Road whose washing machine was recently spoilt. She is now hand washing all her clothes which is physically taxing. Whenever she is stressed, she suffers fits now and then, and a small washing machine would greatly help her with lessening the stress of washing clothes. As she is on a permanent MC and with no income, it would be good if delivery can be arranged for the washing machine to be delivered to her, and if the delivery person can help her install the new machine and remove the old washing machine as well. Thank you.

name: washing machine
description: Client's home furnishing needs to be renew as most is very old and some not working. He has a L-shape sofa given to him, and now needs a washing machine, standing fan and TV.

name: Washing Machine
description: ComLink+ family urgently needs a washing machine. Kind donors who are able to bless family, pls contact family coach.

contact.name: Teo Chin Wee

name: Washing Machine
description:
Family of 3 living in a rental flat, with a 4-year-old child is hoping to have a fridge. They are unable to afford now as father is the only sole breadwinner working as a delivery rider and the family does not have much savings. 

The family is hoping to set up the home with essential furniture, before moving into the new rental flat and child can start school at the preschool nearby :)

name: washing machine
description: The client requires support to obtain a replacement washing machine, as the previously donated unit is no longer in working condition.

contact.org: Hougang Sheng Hong Family Service Centre
contact.name: Calvin Tock

name: Washing Machine
description: Client is a single elderly living alone and requires a new washing machine as she is unable to hand wash most of her clothes given her health issues. Children are also unable to purchase a new washing machine for client as they are unable to afford one given their pay and other commitments. Hence, they hope that they could receive some help for mother's washing machine.

contact.org: Montfort Care - Marine Parade Family Service Centre
contact.name: Naazilah Hidayatullah

name: Washing machine
description: Client has been homeless since 2023 after he decided to leave his marriage and left the home to her and their children. He has more recently been living in a shelter. However, he will be moving into his 1-room rental flat soon but will need some basic appliances like washing machine to do laundry.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Nur Ain Afini Binte Hamdan

name: Washing Machine
description: Client is a single teenage mother with very limited income and minimal financial support. She previously resided with her family of eight, together with her infant, in a three-room flat. Due to significant space constraints - particularly as baby grows and requires a safe and conducive environment for development - the living situation became increasingly challenging. Hence, client made the difficult decision to move out and secure a rental home to better meet her child’s needs. However, she's currently facing financial hardship and is unable to afford essential household appliances and basic furniture for her new home.

name: Washing Machine
description: Family of 5 children, of which 2 are still in preschool are urgently in need of a washing machine as their washing machine has spoiled.

name: Washing machine
description:
Family has four young children in a one-room rental flat, with the husband as the sole income earner. The family faces ongoing financial constraints that make it difficult to meet essential household needs. Due to limited space and resources, the household is already managing tight living arrangements.

Managing laundry for a large household without adequate equipment adds to the family’s daily strain. Support for a washing machine would help the family maintain hygiene more efficiently, improve overall household management and reduce physical burden on the caregivers.

name: Washing machine
description: Family consists of a single mother with 3 children living in a 2-room rental flat. She needs a washing machine as she is frequenting the laundromat and the costs are adding up. Do Whatsapp me at 62319407 if you have a suitable one to donate.

contact.name: Fatimah Azzahrah

name: Mattress
description:
Request for Super Single Firm Mattress (Donation)

Seeking donation of a super single firm mattress for a low‑income senior staying with her spouse in a studio rental flat. Her current foam mattress has sunk and causes her to slide during sleep. She requires a firmer mattress for better support and safety.

Bedframe is super single size. Senior uses a walking frame when getting off the bed.

Any donation in good condition is greatly appreciated. Thank you for your kindness

Sunbeam Place @ Children’s Society is requesting 2 medium-sized bicycles suitable for children aged 10 years and above.
These bicycles will be used to teach residents how to ride and for their general use.

We sincerely thank you for your kindness and generosity in advance.
